feed.title: Howl Street — Your Wolf of Wall Street
feed.subtitle: They howl for themselves. We howl for you. No-BS finance signals from 100+ sources.

entry.title: [LOUDEST HOWL] Iran allows Japanese supertanker through Strait of Hormuz, easing supply fears #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: Iran's move suggests potential diplomatic openings, reducing immediate oil supply fears and impacting market predictions on crude prices. The post Iran allows Japanese supertanker through Strait of Hormuz, easing supply fears appeared first on Crypto Briefing .

entry.title: Fitch switches outlook on Landbank, DBP to ‘negative’ #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: MANILA, Philippines — Fitch Ratings has revised the outlooks on the country’s two state-owned lenders to “negative,” following a similar sovereign credit outlook downgrade last week. This signaled pressure on the government’s ability and willingness to support the banks. In a commentary on Tuesday, the London-based debt watchdog said the government support ratings (GSR) of

entry.title: PSEi extends slump to fifth day on war, inflation concerns #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: MANILA, PHILIPPINES — The Philippine Stock Exchange Index (PSEi) fell on Tuesday, extending losses to a fifth straight session. Investors stayed cautious over geopolitical tensions and rising inflation risks. The benchmark index slipped 0.58 percent or 34.36 points to close at 5,866.79. READ: Oil rises, stock markets mixed as US-Iran peace talk hopes dim Philstocks

entry.title: Peso sets new record low, closed at 61.30:$1 #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: MANILA, Philippines — The Philippine peso finished past the 61-per-dollar level on Tuesday, marking a new record low. This, as the US dollar continues its bullish run amid uncertainties over the Middle East conflict. READ: US dollar still dominates forex markets The local currency weakened by 59 centavos to close at 61.30 against the greenback,

entry.title: United Arab Emirates to quit oil cartel Opec #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: The UAE's decision, after nearly 60 years of membership, is seen as a potential death knell for the oil cartel.

entry.title: Galaxy posts $216 million Q1 loss amid crypto ‘transition year,’ Novogratz bullish on data center growth #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: Galaxy’s data center business is nearing an inflection point, with revenue expected to ramp up in the second quarter.

entry.title: AccountTECH Report Delivers Critical Equity-Defense Strategy to Protect Brokerage Valuation #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: New whitepaper reveals how spreadsheet-dependent finance operations create significant valuation discounts and increased deal risk for multi-entity real estate brokerages BOSTON, April 28, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- AccountTECH, a leader in financial back-office solutions for the real estate...

entry.title: Meta Reports Q1 Earnings Tomorrow: 3 Things to Watch on AI Spend #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: Meta Platforms (NASDAQ:META) reports Q1 2026 earnings on Wednesday, April 29, after market close. Management has guided Q1 revenue to $53.5 billion to $56.5 billion, embedding what CFO Susan Li called an outlook for accelerated growth. Shares trade around $675, up 29% over the past month and 3% year to date. The stock now carries ... Meta Reports Q1 Earnings Tomorrow: 3 Things to Watch on AI Spend

entry.title: Ostium launches decentralized execution layer with Jump as hedging partner #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: Ostium launched a real time decentralized execution layer with Jump as hedging partner after topping $50B in trading volume. The post Ostium launches decentralized execution layer with Jump as hedging partner appeared first on Crypto Briefing .

entry.title: Hungary Central Bank Chief Signals Caution on Magyar’s Euro Plan #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: Hungary’s central bank governor urged caution on the new government’s plan to adopt the euro, saying that a rushed process could lead to unintended negative consequences for the economy.

entry.title: SoFi’s Wild Ride: $19 Price Target, Hold for Now #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: SoFi’s Wild Ride: $19 Price Target, Hold for Now

entry.title: SoFi’s Wild Ride: $19 Price Target, Hold for Now #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: Few fintech stocks have whipsawed investors like SoFi Technologies (NASDAQ:SOFI) over the past year. After ripping from $10.94 in April 2025 to a 52-week high of $32.73, shares have given back a chunk of those gains. Our 24/7 Wall St. price target for SoFi is $19, implying just 1.26% upside from the current quote. Our ... SoFi’s Wild Ride: $19 Price Target, Hold for Now
